provider.name: nous-image-generate
provider.request_canonical_sha256: prompt: T-pose 4-view anatomical body carrier, isolated, no text

rights.notes: AI-generated concept reference; no IP-copying of an existing character; concept/reference use only, not a shipped asset.

validation.review: coherent 4-view T-pose anatomical body, consistent proportions, isolated, clean base (verified by vision)

provider.name: nous-image-generate
provider.request_canonical_sha256: prompt: part-separated medieval plate armor set, 4-view, T-pose, distinct pieces with clearance

rights.notes: AI-generated concept reference; no IP-copying; concept/reference use only.

validation.review: 4 consistent views, articulated plate pieces with visible separation (helmet/cuirass/pauldrons/vambraces/gauntlets/fauld/greaves/boots), isolated (verified by vision); arms slightly A-pose not strict T-pose

provider.name: nous-image-generate
provider.request_canonical_sha256: prompt: disassembled longsword blade/guard/grip/pommel + assembled + scabbard, isolated

rights.notes: AI-generated concept reference; no IP-copying; concept/reference use only.

validation.review: blade/guard/grip/pommel clearly separate + assembled reference + scabbard, clean hard-surface steel, isolated (verified by vision)
